findings.title: Tight list rows read as dark 'funnel' notches between rounded corners
findings.repro: 2-4px row gap + radius over contrasting column bg quantizes to a wedge that reads as a glitch
findings.fix: widen row gap to ~8px OR column bg SURFACE OR radius ~4 on narrow lists
